system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You strike your opponent on the tongue disrupting flow of Qi to the heart causing blood flow to stagnate. On a Success the person feels sluggish, taking a -1d10 to all Mental Skill rolls for one hour per Rank of Dianxue. Cathartic: You lower your target’s Hardiness by 1 per Rank of Dianxue. If this amount reaches zero, the person sinks into a coma (they must make an Endurance roll against TN 7 every hour to avoid death). Hardiness returns at the normal Rate. On a Total Success the effect is permanent. This can also be used to reverse the effects of a Heart Strike.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: Sluggish: -1d10 to all Mental Skill rolls for 1 hour per Rank of Dianxue
system.catharticTargetEffects: If Hardiness reaches 0 from this technique, target enters coma and must roll Endurance TN 7 every hour to avoid death
system.catharticTotalSuccessTargetEffects: Hardiness loss from Heart Strike is permanent; coma rule applies if Hardiness reaches 0
system.catharticEffect: You lower your target’s Hardiness by 1 per Rank of Dianxue. If this amount reaches zero, the person sinks into a coma (they must make an Endurance roll against TN 7 every hour to avoid death). Hardiness returns at the normal Rate. On a Total Success the effect is permanent. This can also be used to reverse the effects of a Heart Strike.
